title: hieracium morulum
intro: Hieracium morulum, also known as lesser hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate the liver and kidneys, and its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Hieracium morulum include its use in treating digestive issues, skin conditions, and urinary tract infections. Herbal preparations of Hieracium morulum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to its potential interactions with other medications.
